zh.Pilkington Manor, Lancashire, England: 英國英格蘭藍卡爾皮爾金頓
zh.of Pilkington, Lancashire, England: 英國英格蘭藍卡爾皮爾金頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Alicia de Bury於大約1302年出生在英國藍卡爾波利時，她的父親Henry de Bury43歲，母親Margaret Radcliffe29歲。她於大約1324年與Sir Roger de Pilkington II結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1374年在英國藍卡爾皮爾金頓享年74歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alicia de Bury于大约1302年出生在英国藍卡爾波利时，她的父亲Henry de Bury43岁，母亲Margaret Radcliffe29岁。她于大约1324年与Sir Roger de Pilkington II结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1374年在英国藍卡爾皮爾金頓享年74岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bury
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire): habitational name from Bury in Lancashire (now part of Greater Manchester), or from some other similarly named place. The placename comes from the dative case, byrig, of Old English burh ‘fortified place’.

Walloon and French: habitational name from any of several places so named, in Wallonia (Belgium) and Oise (France). The placename is from Buriacum, the name of a Gallo-Roman estate, composed of the personal name Burius + the locative suffix -acum. This surname is also found in the Flemish part of Belgium.

variants.name: Buri
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Markus, Kurt.
Swiss German and South German: from an Alemannic pet form of the personal name Burkhard (see Burkhart ).
Italian: patronymic or plural form of   Buro  .

variants.name: Burgh
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name from one or other of the ten English places named Burgh in northern England and East Anglia, or the six named Brough in Derbyshire, Nottinghamshire, Westmorland, and Yorkshire. All these are from Old English burg, burh, Middle English burgh ‘massive earthwork, fortification; manor, borough’. Compare Bury . The placename Burgh is pronounced as borough. The surname Brough arose equally from places now called Burgh and Brough, and is the more common form of the surname in modern Britain, where it is pronounced bruff or broof (/brʊf/). The Scottish surname was probably brought in from Yorkshire. For the surname in Ireland see Burke .

nameMeanings.name: Alicia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Modern Latinate form of   Alice .  It was borne by the British ballerina  Alicia Markova  (born  Lilian Alicia Marks ,  1910–2004 ).

variants.name: Alisha
meanings: Modern Latinate form of   Alice .  It was borne by the British ballerina  Alicia Markova  (born  Lilian Alicia Marks ,  1910–2004 ).

variants.name: Alisia
meanings: Modern Latinate form of   Alice .  It was borne by the British ballerina  Alicia Markova  (born  Lilian Alicia Marks ,  1910–2004 ).

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Alicia de Bury was born about 1302, in Bury, Lancashire, England, her father, Henry de Bury, was 43 and her mother, Margaret Radcliffe, was 29. She married Sir Roger de Pilkington II about 1324. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. She died about 1374, in Pilkington, Lancashire, England, at the age of 74.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alicia de Bury est née environ 1302, à Bury, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Henry de Bury, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Margaret Radcliffe, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Roger de Pilkington II environ 1324. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée environ 1374, à Pilkington, Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 74 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alicia de Bury um 1302 in Bury, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Henry de Bury 43 und ihre Mutter Margaret Radcliffe 29. Sie hat um 1324 Sir Roger de Pilkington II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb um 1374 im Alter von 74 Jahren in Pilkington, Lancashire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alicia de Bury è nata il circa 1302 nel Bury, Lancashire, England, sua padre, Henry de Bury, aveva 43 anni e sua madre, Margaret Radcliffe, aveva 29 anni. Lei sposato Sir Roger de Pilkington II circa 1324. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì circa 1374, nel Pilkington, Lancashire, England, all'età di 74 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Alicia de Buryが約1302年にイギリスランカシュアイアブリーで生まれた時，父Henry de Buryは43歳，母Margaret Radcliffeは29歳であった。約1324年にSir Roger de Pilkington IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1374年にイギリスランカシュアイアピルキントンで74歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alicia de Bury(이)가 대략 1302년 영국 랭카실르 버이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Henry de Bury(은)는 43세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Radcliffe(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 대략 1324년 Sir Roger de Pilkington II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1374년 영국 랭카실르 피킨그턴에서 74세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alicia de Bury nasceu aproximadamente 1302, em Bury, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Henry de Bury, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Radcliffe, tinha 29 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Roger de Pilkington II aproximadamente 1324. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1374, em Pilkington, Lancashire, Inglaterra, com 74 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alicia de Bury родилась около 1302 г. в местности бури, ланкашир, Англия, её отцу по имени Henry de Bury было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Radcliffe, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Roger de Pilkington II около 1324 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла около 1374 г. в местности пилкингтон, ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 74 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alicia de Bury nació aproximadamente 1302, en Bury, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Henry de Bury, tenía 43 años y su mamá, Margaret Radcliffe, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Sir Roger de Pilkington II aproximadamente 1324. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1374, en Pilkington, Lancashire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 74 años.
